t_en: Encourage the customer in front of you to leave.

t_ch: 汪！我是为你带来幸福的汽水狗狗，在你变得快乐前我都不会走的哇！
t_en: Woof! I'm the Soda Doggo that brings you happiness. I won't be going anywhere until you are happy!

t_ch: （…还是好好完成舒翁的委托吧。）
t_en: (...I should work toward completing Siobhan's assignment.)

t_ch: 我超爱这杯饮料汪！新来的调饮师，你在服务客人方面好厉害哇！
t_en: I love this drink, woof! Newbie, you are top of the pack when it comes to serving customers!

t_ch: 汪！我还有个问题哇，就是…外面那么多好玩的地方，为什么你要来这里做调饮师哇？
t_en: Woof! I still have a question, woof! Umm... With so many fun places out there, why did you come here to be a drinksmith?

t_ch: 因为接受了舒翁的委托。
汪！花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
t_en: Woof! Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!
Because I'm passionate about mixing drinks.

t_ch: 汪！看看你说的话，你自己相信吗？说谎话是不对的哇！
t_en: Woof! Just listen to yourself. Do you even believe in what you just said? It's no good to lie!

t_ch: 这不是你的酒吧，花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
t_en: This isn't your lounge. Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!

t_ch: 明明是个打工的人，就不要用调饮师来自称了嘛。名字再厉害，也掩盖不了本质嘛。
t_en: If you're just here working a job, you shouldn't use the title of drinksmith. A fancy title isn't going to cover your essence.
(...I've almost reached the limit of my endurance.)

t_ch: 你比那个黑桃讨厌多了！
t_en: You're a bigger pain than that Spade!

t_ch: 我很好相处的，处不好在自己身上找找原因哇！
t_en: I'm pretty easygoing. If you don't get along with me, maybe the problem lies with you!

t_ch: 我的情绪很稳定哇，稳定地让你讨厌。这样有什么问题吗？
t_en: I'm emotionally stable. So emotionally stable that you'll be annoyed. Is there a problem with that?

t_ch: 汪！倒是你，作为调饮师，却对顾客提出过分的评价，这样很不对的哇！
t_en: What about yourself, woof? As the drinksmith, making harsh comments about your customers is rude and inappropriate!

t_ch: 你不觉得自己更过分吗？
t_en: Don't you think you're the one crossing the line here?

t_ch: 有吗？或许有吧，那要不咱们约定，要是谁再用言语攻击对方，谁就是狗狗哇。
t_en: Am I? I mean, maybe. Let's make a deal. Whoever uses their words to attack the other person will be declared a dog.

t_ch: 这样公平了吧！没任何问题汪！
t_en: That's fair, right? That should be no problem, woof!
...I don't want to discuss this with you anymore.

t_ch: 说不过就屏蔽哇。遇到你这种不讲道理的人，就算是宽容的汽水狗狗也没办法哇。
t_en: You resort to blocking me when you can't win. Even a tolerant Soda Doggo can't do anything about an unreasonable person like yourself.

t_ch: 汪！没什么想说的了，还是继续喝饮料吧，想来杯<color=#dbc291ff>微甜</color>的饮料！你能做到吗？
t_en: Woof! There's nothing much to say. Better just continue drinking. I want a <color=#dbc291ff>slightly sweet</color> drink! Can you do it?

t_ch: 不对！我要的不是这个汪！不会吧，不会有人连酒单上的字都看不明白哇？
t_en: Nope! This isn't what I wanted, woof! No way. Could someone actually be incapable of reading the words on a drink menu?

t_ch: 汪！我还有个问题哇，就是…外面那么多好玩的地方，为什么你要来这里做调饮师哇？
t_en: Woof! I still have a question, woof! Umm... With so many fun places out there, why did you come here to be a drinksmith?

t_ch: 因为接受了舒翁的委托。
汪！花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
t_en: Woof! Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!
Because I'm passionate about mixing drinks.

t_ch: 汪！看看你说的话，你自己相信吗？说谎话是不对的哇！
t_en: Woof! Just listen to yourself. Do you even believe in what you just said? It's no good to lie!

t_ch: 这不是你的酒吧，花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
t_en: This isn't your lounge. Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!

t_ch: 明明是个打工的人，就不要用调饮师来自称了嘛。名字再厉害，也掩盖不了本质嘛。
t_en: If you're just here working a job, you shouldn't use the title of drinksmith. A fancy title isn't going to cover your essence.
(...I've almost reached the limit of my endurance.)

t_ch: 你比那个黑桃讨厌多了！
t_en: You're a bigger pain than that Spade!

t_ch: 好喝的饮料，喜欢的味道！你好懂怎么让我开心哇！
t_en: Delicious drink! A flavor I like! You really know how to make me happy!

t_ch: 嗝！有点晕乎乎的…和你聊天好开心，我还会来酒吧找你玩的，要记得欢迎我哇！
t_en: Burp! I'm feeling a bit dizzy... It's so nice talking to you! I'll come hang out with you some other day. Be sure to welcome me with open arms!

t_ch: 我是给所有人带来幸福的汽水狗——再见！
t_en: I am the Soda Dog that brings happiness to everyone. Goodbye!

t_ch: 有吗？或许有吧，那要不咱们约定，要是谁再用言语攻击对方，谁就是狗狗哇。
t_en: Am I? I mean, maybe. Let's make a deal. Whoever uses their words to attack the other person will be declared a dog.

t_ch: 这样公平了吧！没任何问题汪！
t_en: That's fair, right? That should be no problem, woof!
...I don't want to discuss this with you anymore.

t_ch: 说不过就屏蔽哇。遇到你这种不讲道理的人，就算是宽容的汽水狗狗也没办法哇。
t_en: You resort to blocking me when you can't win. Even a tolerant Soda Doggo can't do anything about an unreasonable person like yourself.

t_ch: 汪！没什么想说的了，还是继续喝饮料吧，想来杯<color=#dbc291ff>微甜</color>的饮料！你能做到吗？
t_en: Woof! There's nothing much to say. Better just continue drinking. I want a <color=#dbc291ff>slightly sweet</color> drink! Can you do it?

t_ch: 我是给所有人带来幸福的汽水狗——再见！
t_en: I am the Soda Dog that brings happiness to everyone. Goodbye!

t_ch: 汪！带来幸福的汽水狗狗又来拜访你了！期待吗？开心吗？
t_en: Woof! The Soda Doggo that brings happiness has returned to visit you! Were you looking forward to seeing me? Are you happy?
...I didn't want you to come at all.

t_ch: 这样吗，但我也根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
t_en: Oh, is that so? But I don't care what you think anyway!
I was looking forward to this! I'm so happy!

t_ch: 谢谢你！但你期待也没用，我根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
t_en: Thank you! But no matter how much you look forward to it, it's pointless. I don't care what you think in the slightest!

t_ch: 汪！我想去哪就去哪，想说什么就说什么，谁都管不着！
t_en: Woof! I go wherever I please and say whatever I want. There's nothing anyone can do about me!

t_ch: 曾经我也像你这样，忙着给每位顾客送饮料，别人对我说话，我只能回答：「收到汪」。
t_en: I used to be like you, busily serving drinks to customers. If anyone said something to me, I'd just respond with, "Roger, woof!"

t_ch: 但在某个时候，我突然悟了哇！狗狗的命也是命，与其消耗自己，不如消耗对方！
t_en: But one day, I had this epiphany! A dog's life is also a life. Rather than let people shave off time from my life, I'll shave it off of theirs.

t_ch: 什么都不做的话，对方根本不会注意你。自己开心才是最重要的哇！
t_en: If you don't do anything, no one will notice you. All that matters is that you are happy.

t_ch: 汪！你终于明白了！但想通只是开始，最重要的是要付诸行动哇！
t_en: Woof! You finally get it! But getting it is only the beginning. What's most important is that you take action!
You still make my blood boil!

t_ch: 汪！生气也没用。只要你还在给别人工作，就必须先忍着哇！
t_en: Woof! No point in being angry. As long as you're working for someone else, you better put a lid on it!

t_ch: 看你也挺累的，不如现在开始跟我练习吧！给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>大份浓浓的</color>饮料，我就教你该怎么和人接触哇。
t_en: I see you're pretty tired. Why not start practicing with me? Make me a <color=#dbc291ff>large and strong</color> drink and I'll teach you how to interact with people.

t_ch: （它这种说话方式…真的不会被揍吗？）
t_en: (With a mouth like that... how is it not getting a beat down?)

t_ch: 玻璃杯在手中泛着美妙的光，让你觉得非常舒适。
t_en: The glass in your hand has a gorgeous glow and makes you feel an incredible sense of comfort.

t_ch: 味道真的好棒！从现在起，你就是狗狗心目中最优秀的调饮师了！
t_en: The flavor is amazing! From now on, you are the best drinksmith in my heart!

t_ch: 喝完了饮料，该教你怎么说话了。咳咳，听好哇……
t_en: After drinking this, it's time to teach you how to talk. Hehe, listen up...

t_ch: ——喂！傻狗！嘿嘿嘿，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜，还想教人呢？
t_en: Hey! Idiot dog! Heh heh heh. You really want to teach someone with that pathetic brain of yours?

t_ch: 新来的，别被这只狗的外表给骗啦！装出可爱的样子，其实…嘿，嘴里全是难听的话！
t_en: Newbie, don't let this dog's appearance dupe you! That dog looks cute, but in reality... everything it has to say is unpleasant!

t_ch: 以前它还是派送员的时候，收到的差评就是最多的！嘲讽客户，偷喝汽水，私吞小费…就没干过什么正经事！除了尾巴摇得特欢！
t_en: When that dog was a courier, it got the highest number of negative reviews! Making fun of customers, stealing soda, and pocketing tips... It's never done what it's supposed to, beyond wagging that tail of its so happily.

t_ch: 是吧！我虽然疯，可我不害人啊，但和它认识这么久，就没听到过几句好话！
t_en: Good! I may be crazy, but I've never hurt anybody. I've known that dog for a long time, I've never heard anything good about it!

t_ch: 哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
t_en: Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?

t_ch: 劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
t_en: Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!

t_ch: 汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
t_en: Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.

t_ch: …嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
t_en: ...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!

t_ch: 我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
t_en: I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!

t_ch: 别在意，荷官先生的话都是骗人的哇！不像我，永远都只会对你友好地摇尾巴哇！
t_en: Everything Mr. Dealer says is a lie, so don't mind him! He's not like me. I'll always wag my tail in a friendly way to you! That's the only thing I can do!

t_ch: 谢谢！只要摇几下尾巴，你就会信任我。你还真是好骗哇！
t_en: Thank you! You'd trust me just with a few wags of my tail! You're so easy to fool.
Do you think I'd believe you?

t_ch: 你不相信也无所谓，反正我也只是随口说说哇！
t_en: I don't care if you don't believe me. I'm just saying whatever I want!

t_ch: 汪！好渴！再给我调杯饮料，要<color=#dbc291ff>甜甜的，清清爽爽</color>的类型！
t_en: Woof! Delish! Hit me with another. I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet, refreshing</color>, something along those lines!

t_ch: （…怎么感觉它们的关系不太好？）
t_en: (...I get the sense that these two don't have a good relationship.)

t_ch: …汪？连狗狗的需求都没法完成，你实在是太差劲了哇！
t_en: ...Woof? You won't even fulfill a dog's requests? You really do suck!

t_ch: 喝完了饮料，该教你怎么说话了。咳咳，听好哇……
t_en: After drinking this, it's time to teach you how to talk. Hehe, listen up...

t_ch: ——喂！傻狗！嘿嘿嘿，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜，还想教人呢？
t_en: Hey! Idiot dog! Heh heh heh. You really want to teach someone with that pathetic brain of yours?

t_ch: 新来的，别被这只狗的外表给骗啦！装出可爱的样子，其实…嘿，嘴里全是难听的话！
t_en: Newbie, don't let this dog's appearance dupe you! That dog looks cute, but in reality... everything it has to say is unpleasant!

t_ch: 以前它还是派送员的时候，收到的差评就是最多的！嘲讽客户，偷喝汽水，私吞小费…就没干过什么正经事！除了尾巴摇得特欢！
t_en: When that dog was a courier, it got the highest number of negative reviews! Making fun of customers, stealing soda, and pocketing tips... It's never done what it's supposed to, beyond wagging that tail of its so happily.

t_ch: 是吧！我虽然疯，可我不害人啊，但和它认识这么久，就没听到过几句好话！
t_en: Good! I may be crazy, but I've never hurt anybody. I've known that dog for a long time, I've never heard anything good about it!

t_ch: 哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
t_en: Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?

t_ch: 劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
t_en: Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!

t_ch: 汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
t_en: Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.

t_ch: …嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
t_en: ...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!

t_ch: 我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
t_en: I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!

t_ch: 别在意，荷官先生的话都是骗人的哇！不像我，永远都只会对你友好地摇尾巴哇！
t_en: Everything Mr. Dealer says is a lie, so don't mind him! He's not like me. I'll always wag my tail in a friendly way to you! That's the only thing I can do!

t_ch: 谢谢！只要摇几下尾巴，你就会信任我。你还真是好骗哇！
t_en: Thank you! You'd trust me just with a few wags of my tail! You're so easy to fool.
Do you think I'd believe you?

t_ch: 你不相信也无所谓，反正我也只是随口说说哇！
t_en: I don't care if you don't believe me. I'm just saying whatever I want!

t_ch: 汪！好渴！再给我调杯饮料，要<color=#dbc291ff>甜甜的，清清爽爽</color>的类型！
t_en: Woof! Delish! Hit me with another. I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet, refreshing</color>, something along those lines!

t_ch: （…怎么感觉它们的关系不太好？）
t_en: (...I get the sense that these two don't have a good relationship.)

t_ch: 汪！味道真棒，舒翁不在的时候，你就是这里最伟大的调饮师了哇！
t_en: Woof! This tastes amazing! When Siobhan's not around, you are the greatest drinksmith here!

t_ch: 汪！心情变得超好！但…是不是喝太多了，看到了好多黑色的影子哇。
t_en: Woof! You really turned my mood around! But... I wonder if I drank too much. I'm seeing lots of black spots.

t_ch: 这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
t_en: Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!
...Woof? You want to play with me? Wait for me!

t_ch: （黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
t_en: (Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)

t_ch: （不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
t_en: (But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)

t_ch: 不是这个汪…你的脑子也像荷官先生那样不是很好使哇！
t_en: This is not it, woof... The function of your brain is just as off as Mr. Dealer!

t_ch: 汪！心情变得超好！但…是不是喝太多了，看到了好多黑色的影子哇。
t_en: Woof! You really turned my mood around! But... I wonder if I drank too much. I'm seeing lots of black spots.

t_ch: 这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
t_en: Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!
...Woof? You want to play with me? Wait for me!

t_ch: （黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
t_en: (Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)

t_ch: （不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
t_en: (But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)
Are you looking for me, old man?

t_ch: 好吧，咱们不扯这些闲篇了，先前你帮了不少忙，我想着也得投桃报李——
t_en: Well, never mind that. You did me a great favor, so I thought I'd repay your kindness...

t_ch: 最近有个后辈捣鼓出了个小东西，我估摸着你会喜欢。我跟他打过招呼了，你可以过去玩玩，还挺有意思的。
t_en: Recently, a young fella made a gadget, and I thought you might like it. I've given him a heads-up. You can go over there and have some fun. It's pretty interesting.

t_ch: 喏，他才回空间站，一听你来了，就在这附近恭候你呢——
t_en: He just came back to the space station, and when he heard you were coming, he waited there for you...

t_ch: 嚯，你就是大家说的{NICKNAME}，那个无名客是吧？
t_en: Ooh, so you're that {NICKNAME} everyone's talking about. The Nameless, huh?

t_ch: 呃，莱桑德老叔没跟你打过招呼吗？
t_en: Uh, didn't old Lysander mention me to you?
Lysander asked me to come to you...
Yeah, it's me! You've found the right person.

t_ch: 咳咳，简单自我介绍下吧，我叫鲍勃，维修科的科员，刚回空间站。
t_en: Ahem, let me introduce myself. I'm Bob. I work in the Maintenance Department, and I just got back to the space station.

t_ch: 前阵子我去匹诺康尼度假去了，没想到竟错过了你这么位大人物，实在可惜。
t_en: I was on vacation in Penacony, and little did I know I'd miss meeting a big shot like you there.
Don't butter me up. Let's get to the point...

t_ch: 哎，我这不是拍马屁…「黑粉群」里讨论过了，有鼻子有眼的，我是实打实地佩服你。
t_en: Well, I'm not trying to butter you up... We were discussing things in the Heritor group, and I genuinely admired you.

t_ch: 你怎么到匹诺康尼去了？
呃，就度假地而言，「盛会之星」应该都是智慧生命的首选吧……
t_en: Um, when it comes to vacations, any intelligent life would choose the Planet of Festivities, right...?

t_ch: 咳，我去匹诺康尼，除了度假之外，顺道还解决了一道技术难题。
t_en: Ahem, so I went to Penacony for a vacation and ended up solving a technical issue along the way.

t_ch: 有位流光忆庭的技术人员在那儿，先前我们在邮件里交流过几次…在她的帮助下，我得以提取出这团玩意——
t_en: I met a technician from the Garden of Recollection there, with whom I had exchanged several emails before... With her help, I managed to extract this stuff...

t_ch: 鲍勃示意你看向他身旁的这团忆泡。
t_en: Bob gestures towards the memory bubble next to him.

t_ch: 对啊，花了我不少心血的，我自己测试过了，特有意思。
t_en: Yeah, it took me a lot of effort. I tested it myself, and it's pretty fun.

t_ch: 不不不，这不是普通的忆泡。
t_en: Nah, nah, it's not "just" an ordinary memory bubble.

t_ch: …这个忆泡…承载了我的童年回忆…还有所有的快乐……
t_en: This memory bubble... holds all my childhood memories... and all the good times...

t_ch: 这话题转得太生硬了吧？
t_en: Why such a sudden change of topic?

t_ch: 咳咳，这个抱歉，想起童年往事，难免有点感叹。
t_en: Ahem, my bad. I couldn't help but get sentimental when I think about my childhood memories.

t_ch: 我没有难过，我只是有点唏嘘，毕竟是多少年前的回忆了。
t_en: I'm not feeling down, just getting a bit sentimental, you know? It's all those memories from way back when.

t_ch: 我小时候特别爱玩一款游戏，来空间站之后我还想复刻出来…可惜那家游戏公司早就倒闭了，我想买版权都不知道找谁买……
t_en: When I was a kid, I was crazy about this game, and I thought about recreating it when I came to the space station... But unfortunately, the game company went bankrupt ages ago, and I had no clue whom to contact for the rights...

t_ch: 好在，在某次睡梦中，我有了灵感——或许，我能通过「记忆」这种介质，将童年的游戏复刻出来……
t_en: Luckily, I had this amazing idea in my dreams: What if I recreated the game using my "memories" as the basis...?

t_ch: 这个专项研究我做了大半年了，有空间站的便利条件，再加上一些技术支持，嘿嘿，现在成功捣鼓出来了。
t_en: I've been working on this project for almost a year now. With all the resources on the space station and some technical assistance, I've finally made it happen.

t_ch: 这个忆泡，实际上就是「战意狂潮•童年回忆无污染赤诚燃魂整合版」——简单的定制化战斗游戏，你能和记忆中的仇敌安全畅快地打上一整天！
t_en: This memory bubble is actually "Tides of War: Untainted Childhood Memories Passionate-Heart Burning-Soul Ultimate Collection" — It's a cool and easy customized fighting game where you can battle all those childhood foes in the memory for a whole day!

t_ch: 而且…我在里面加入了大量的定制化内容，有辅助功能在…玩起来比我小时候玩的老版本轻松多了！
t_en: And... I've added all sorts of customized features and assists in there... Now it's way easier than the old version I played as a kid!

t_ch: 啊，这…这个，这怎么能算开挂，又不是什么「声控一声通关」，要自己慢慢打的！
t_en: W—Well, it's not... not a cheat, yeah! It's not like you press a button and instantly beat the game! You still have to clear those stages yourself!

t_ch: …这，只能说是年龄问题，代沟嘛……
t_en: ...Well, that's how they named games back in the day, you know...

t_ch: 来来来，这玩意还在「内测」阶段，莱桑德老叔让我给你留了个名额，你来试试呗！
t_en: Anyway, this game is still in alpha, and Uncle Lysander has asked me to save you a spot. Why not come and give it a try?

t_ch: 怎么说，你全打通了？这才多久啊…我不信！我小时候明明要打上好几个月才能通关……
t_en: What? You've beaten the entire game already?... No way! It took me months to beat it when I was a kid...
Well, you were just a kid back then...

t_ch: 也是，小时候的我…哪能跟你这个大个子比啊！合理，非常合理！
t_en: Yeah, you're right... You can't expect a kid to beat a game as fast as an adult! That totally makes sense!

t_ch: 非常简单，随便打打就过了。
t_en: This game is just a piece of cake.

t_ch: …好吧，或许这就是无名客的非凡之处。
t_en: ...Alright. I guess you Nameless are simply extraordinary.

t_ch: 无名客见识广，你身手又了得，还能给我这小玩意做测试……
t_en: The Nameless is well-traveled, you have moves, and yet you can even test this little thing for me...

t_ch: 说真的，谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，你能来玩，是我的荣幸，你的测试数据也帮了我大忙。
t_en: Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#老姐}{M#老哥}，怎么样，玩玩看嘛？好歹是我小半年的研究心血，帮忙测试下给点意见呗！
t_en: Want to have some fun, {F#Sister}{M#Brother} {NICKNAME}? I've put almost a year into this game, so give it a go and let me know what you think!

t_ch: 无名客见识广，你身手又了得，还能给我这小玩意做测试……
t_en: The Nameless is well-traveled, you have moves, and yet you can even test this little thing for me...

t_ch: 说真的，谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，你能来玩，是我的荣幸，你的测试数据也帮了我大忙。
t_en: Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.

t_ch: 我感觉这个项目大有可为啊，说不定能为空间站创收不少，嘿嘿！
t_en: I really think this project has loads of potential. Maybe it could rake in some serious cash for the space station! Hee-hee!

t_ch: 越来越搞不懂这些年轻人…算咯，他们开心就好……
t_en: Seems like I'm getting more and more out of touch with these young folks... Well, as long as they're happy, that's what matters...

t_ch: 汪  汪  汪  汪
汪  汪  汪  汪
汪  汪  汪  汪
汪  汪  汪  汪
汪  汪  汪  汪

t_ch: 扮演<color=#f29e38ff>蓝色的折纸小鸟</color>，加入到《美梦进行曲》的<color=#f29e38ff>合奏</color>里啾！
